implemented_functions.name: validate_window_config
implemented_functions.description: Validate window parameters; returns {valid, errors, warnings, window_count, underpowered}
implemented_functions.note: Flags UNDERPOWERED when total_count < window_size; never raises

implemented_functions.name: rolling_slices
implemented_functions.description: Forward sliding window slices; step_size controls stride
implemented_functions.note: include_partial=True adds terminal partial window; default False for strict full-windows-only

implemented_functions.name: tail_window
implemented_functions.description: RSM pattern: items[-window_size:] or all items if fewer available

implemented_functions.name: rolling_window_labels
implemented_functions.description: Labels like 'w150[0:150]' for each full window position
implemented_functions.note: Stable format; can be used as dict key or audit trace

implemented_functions.name: tail_window_label
implemented_functions.note: Matches RSM/research convention; documents partial-window situation

implemented_functions.name: summarize_window
implemented_functions.description: Compute count/mean/min/max/std for a single window of values
implemented_functions.note: Returns None for non-numeric or mixed-type windows; deterministic

implemented_functions.name: rolling_summary
implemented_functions.description: Canonical SSOT output: all window series with no_edge_claim=True
implemented_functions.note: Accepts single int or tuple of window sizes; P221F_WINDOWS['short'] = (100,125,150)

final_decision: P252F complete. rolling_window.py SSOT implemented at lottery_api/utils/rolling_window.py. 7 pure-Python functions + P221F/RSM window constants cover M3 rolling window gap. P221F frozen windows (short 100/125/150, mid 500/750/1000) and RSM windows (30/100/300) are both exposed as named constants. No DB write. No registry mutation. No strategy promotion. No betting advice. Recommended next: P252G — implement M7 signal stability diagnostics SSOT (P1).
